generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had real civil defense drills? Those days are gone. Now, our leaders won't even fund basic preparedness programs. Meanwhile, foreign powers are testing our resilience. We need to demand better protection for our communities. Share if you agree - we can't afford to be unprepared!
